homepage.areaRugsDesc: This area has heavy foot traffic so you should pick a long runner in dark colour that has durable material. Dark colour is the best choice for the entryway which hides dirt and stains easily.
homepage.bedRoomRugsDesc: The bedroom is the cosy area of the home so choose a consistent colour scheme with a comfortable design style under the bed. You can choose a textured rug or runner for the bedroom.
homepage.diningRoomRugsDesc: The dining room is the area where all family members eat together so choose a rectangular or square rug that complements the dining table well. The rug should be durable and washable.
homepage.livingRoomRugsDesc: When choosing a rug for the living room, keep three things in mind — size, style and texture. The right rug size makes the room look larger and complements the sofa, wall colour and décor accessories.
homepage.consideringRugs: Considering rugs for your kitchen, living room and bedroom? Browse our extensive collection
homepage.popularCushionPillowDesc: Explore our wide range of comfortable and stylish cushions and pillows.
homepage.popularRugsRunnersDesc: Discover premium quality rugs and runners to enhance your home décor.
homepage.popularMacrameDesc: Add elegance to your home with our handcrafted wall hanging macramé designs.
homepage.popularBlanketsDesc: Stay cosy with our soft and warm throw blankets suitable for every season.
homepage.popularBagsDesc: Browse our collection of versatile and trendy bags for every occasion.
